resources.string: 5 AI-enhanced accessibility rules — each violated on its own screen.
Image carries informational text, but the alt label is missing or generic.
Decorative-looking ImageViews actually convey meaning, with no/poor contentDescription.
Icon-only buttons whose labels are missing, generic, or contextually wrong.
Screen-reader focus order does not match the logical reading order.
Visual arrangement contradicts the natural left-to-right / top-to-bottom flow.
